installCommand: cd ../.. && corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10.32.1 --activate && rm -rf node_modules/.pnpm && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --filter=@paperwork-labs/distill...
ignoreCommand: bash -c 'if git log -1 --pretty=%an | grep -qi dependabot; then echo "Dependabot commit, skipping build" && exit 0; else exit 1; fi'
